name: all_ffs
short_description: Get a list of flip flop cells in the current design
full_help:
all_ffs

Description: 
Get a list of flip flop cells in the current design

Syntax: 
all_ffs  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
list of flip flop cell objects

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
